rationale: In the citing paper, VanEpps et al. (2016) appears only in a grouped methodological citation when justifying control variables (dieting/hunger) in the food-consumption studies. The paper does not use this cited work to develop hypotheses, motivate the core robot-discomfort mechanism, interpret results, or position the main contribution. Its role is a brief supporting reference rather than a meaningful conceptual or empirical building block.
